  1. Trier /

  3. Hotel Casa Chiara

★★★ · Trier-Nord

Hotel Casa Chiara

⭐ 8.5/10 · 720 reviews · From 79 €

Casa Chiara is a 20-room B&B-style hotel (Hotel garni) on Trier's Moselle bank. Family-run, with a fresh breakfast and fair prices. Very quiet, yet only ten minutes on foot from the Porta Nigra.

Amenities

Hotel garniMosel-LageFamiliengefuehrt

★★★

Trier-Nord

Ibis Trier

Reliable brand standard at fair prices next to the main train station. Arrive, check in, head into town.

⭐ 8.2/10 · 2350 reviews From 69 €
★★★★

Trier-Nord

Moselpark Trier

Large 4-star hotel on the Moselle riverbank. Pool, spa, conference rooms, family rooms.

⭐ 8.3/10 · 1620 reviews From 99 €

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.
